major-resources.headersHelper: bash -c 'TOKEN=$(major user ensure-auth); [ -z "$TOKEN" ] && exit 1; ORG=$(major org id 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$ORG" ] && exit 1; echo "{\"Authorization\": \"Bearer $TOKEN\", \"x-major-org-id\": \"$ORG\"}"'

major-platform.headersHelper: bash -c 'TOKEN=$(major user ensure-auth); [ -z "$TOKEN" ] && exit 1; ORG=$(major org id 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$ORG" ] && exit 1; echo "{\"Authorization\": \"Bearer $TOKEN\", \"x-major-org-id\": \"$ORG\"}"'
